seoTitle: Kalgan vs Kalgup — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kalgan and Kalgup. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kalgan and Kalgup.
heading: Kalgan vs Kalgup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kalgan, Western Australia and Kalgup, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kalgan has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Kalgup (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kalgan or Kalgup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kalgan has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Kalgup scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kalgan scores 15/100 for bushfire risk. Kalgup scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kalgan or Kalgup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kalgan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
